---
title: "VolregResult"
generated: true
description: "Output of [`volreg`](../nitrix-register/volreg.qmd)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._volreg`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:VolregResult -->
```python
class VolregResult(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:VolregResult -->
Output of [`volreg`](../nitrix-register/volreg.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
